author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو زكريا يحيى بن معين بن عون بن زياد بن بسطام بن عبد الرحمن المري بالولاء، البغدادي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: One of the most prominent hadith scholars and critics of the early Islamic period, known for his expertise in the evaluation of narrators.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A foundational work in the field of hadith criticism, particularly in the evaluation of the narrators of Imam az-Zuhri.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: This work is significant for its detailed evaluations of the narrators of hadith, providing critical insights into the reliability of various transmitters.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Ahmad Muhammad Nur Saif is a respected scholar and editor known for his meticulous work in the field of hadith and Islamic history.
